title: potentilla grandiflora var. pyrenaica
intro: Potentilla grandiflora var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and native to the Pyrenees mountains. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrenean cinquefoil include its potential use as a treatment for fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
